desktop.title: Home
desktop.text:
There is grace in the ordinary.

In Colonial times, the town tavern was called the ordinary. It was more than a place to drink and eat. It was a place to connect and collaborate, or relax and celebrate, with the community. This is our version, refined.

NEW, YET FAMILIAR SOMEHOW

This is the traditional tavern with a fresh twist—new, yet familiar, which also describes our menu. Prepared on an open hearth, we call it “refined rustic.”

A PLACE TO BE COMFORTABLE

For the owners, award-winning chef Chris Curren and wife Megan, this is a new opportunity to do what they love in the community where they live. Their vision: to create a place to be comfortable and an experience to be remembered.

Adam Kappesser
CHEF DE CUISINE
our Team

From the front of the house to the back of the kitchen, we are a group of dedicated people united by a sincere desire to create something special together.
